name: 300 MG Pregabalin Capsules IP
about: 300 MG Pregabalin Capsules IP is a general medicine manufactured in India. Each box contains 10x15 capsules that can be stored in a cool place. The recommended dosage for this medicine is 300 mg as per the doctors suggestion. The medicine comes in a capsule form that is easy to swallow. Pregabalin is commonly used to treat seizures, anxiety, and nerve pain caused by diabetes or shingles. This medicine works by reducing the number of pain signals that are sent out by damaged nerves in the body. It is important to follow the dosage guidelines provided by the doctor to avoid any side effects.
